judge_reason: Description B invents specific handwritten text and a red stamp that are not mentioned in Description A, indicating a factual contradiction on visual content.
original_image_tags: A yellow manila document envelope or folder flap, oriented vertically. Two punched holes are visible at the top edge. A clear plastic fastener or label holder is affixed near the bottom center.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A manila file folder cover with two punched holes at the top, a clear plastic label pocket taped near the lower center, handwritten pencil and red pen notations near the bottom, and a diagonal red “ENCLOSURE” stamp near the lower right.*
